index.start_way: Your token deserves a real market. We build it.
index.start_way_desc: Cross-venue market making across 50+ CEX and any DEX your token trades on — from centralized order books to on-chain pools.
index.market_making_desc:
Institutional-grade execution across every venue.
From Binance to Raydium to StonFi – 50+ CEX and 30+ DEX across 17 chains. Real-time on-chain analysis of liquidity flows, wallet patterns, and trade data included.
index.development_desc:
Build with confidence.
We develop scalable Web3 products: from MVPs to full-stack DApps and CEX/DEX integrations – accelerating time-to-market with robust architecture and clean code.
index.consulting_desc:
Strategic consulting that unlocks real traction.
Whether you’re launching or scaling, our team brings deep market insight, strategic frameworks, and a powerful partner network to drive measurable growth.
index.about_us_desc:
A multidisciplinary team at the forefront of crypto innovation.
With deep experience in trading, engineering, and DeFi strategy, we architect next-gen fintech systems for tomorrow’s market leaders.
index.dmitry_experience: MORE THAN 6 YEARS OF OVERALL EXPERIENCE IN WEB3

market_making.market_making_desc:
Cross-venue liquidity, built to scale.
From centralized order books to on-chain pools – our algorithms keep your token liquid, stable, and competitive across every platform it trades on.
market_making.dex_lead: Native integrations across every major on-chain venue — from Solana memecoins to EVM bluechips.
market_making.dex_desc: We don't just provide liquidity: we monitor external flows, wallet concentration, and trade patterns in real time.
market_making.orderbook_section_title: What our liquidity does to your market
market_making.orderbook_section_desc: A thin order book is the #1 reason tokens lose momentum. We fix that.
market_making.candle_section_title: What your chart looks like with us
market_making.candle_section_desc: Before: volatile, choppy, low volume. After market making starts: tighter price action, volume builds, trend holds.
market_making.bubblemap_section_desc: Concentrated supply kills investor confidence and triggers sell-offs. We redistribute holder concentration to make your token look — and be — healthy.
market_making.volume_control_desc: Consistent two-sided quoting keeps your order book deep and your spreads tight. We place and refresh bids and asks continuously so real buyers and sellers always have counterparty — reducing slippage and making your token tradable at any size.
market_making.anti_snape_desc: Launch-day sniping concentrates supply in hostile wallets before organic buyers can participate. We deploy protective order placement strategies that distribute early trades more fairly and reduce the window for predatory front-running bots.
market_making.control_prices_desc: Wide spreads signal a thin, risky market and push traders away. Through continuous two-sided quoting, we tighten the bid-ask spread to a level consistent with liquid assets — improving price discovery and execution quality for every participant.
market_making.start_tokens_lead: We acquire 80%+ of your token's circulating supply at block 0 — before the market opens.
market_making.start_tokens_desc: Full-stack support from contract to market: architecture, deployment, listings, and liquidity bootstrapping from day one.
market_making.prof_support:
Why is professional
support so important during launch?
market_making.prof_support_1_desc: Access to top-tier listings and exchange integrations from day one.
market_making.prof_support_2_desc: Liquidity and volatility under control in the first minutes of trading.
market_making.prof_support_3_desc: Structured go-to-market backed by data and experience.
market_making.prof_support_4_desc: Confident, predictable execution built on data — not improvisation.
market_making.cex_lead: Institutional-grade market making across 50+ centralized exchanges.
market_making.cex_desc: Deep order books, tight spreads, and delta-neutral risk management — all running simultaneously across every venue your token trades on.
market_making.cex_listing_desc: Binance, OKX, Bybit, Gate.io, KuCoin and 45 more — active simultaneously. One integration, every major venue covered from day one.
market_making.optimization_orders_desc: Continuous two-sided quoting keeps your bid-ask spread at institutional levels — even under high volatility or thin conditions.
market_making.liquidity_manage_desc: Automated cross-venue hedging keeps directional exposure delta-neutral. No blown positions — just clean, stable market making around the clock.

dev.dev_desc: Transform your idea into a working product — with clean architecture, secure code, and short release cycles.
dev.design_front: Interface & graphic design: websites, apps, dashboards, icons, branding kits.
dev.design_back: Graphics and design are the face of any project. They give the project a unique style and help sell it.
dev.development_front: Frontend & backend, smart contracts, bots, mobile and desktop apps – built from spec to launch.
dev.development_back: Strongest expertise in developing solutions of varying complexity. Each of our engineers has worked in tech giants in fintech, edtech, and other industries.
dev.web3_front: Automation scripts, trading bots, price trackers, admin panels, infrastructure tools.
dev.web3_back: We automate routine operations, simplify project management, or develop robots for your trading strategy.
dev.dapp_front: Custom decentralized apps: DEXs, launchpads, GameFi, NFT, and staking platforms.
dev.dapp_back: Our DApp engineers bring production-grade experience across DEXs, launchpads, and GameFi — built for scale from day one.
dev.web_apps_front: Web platforms with API/Telegram integration, internal tools, analytics and CMS features.
dev.web_apps_back: The new standard for apps, which we've been working with since its inception. We develop solutions from simple apps to large-scale marketplaces.
dev.analysis_desc:
Developing the project's business logic,
describing its details and system in technical language.
The first and most important stage that determines the entire
further course of the project.
dev.development_cycle_desc:
At this stage, your idea comes to life, and you can
observe it in weekly reports.
We not only write code but also prepare servers, databases, and
the entire system for real-world use.
dev.testing_desc:
The final stage before launch.
We run a full test suite to confirm quality and reliability —
so you ship with confidence.
dev.tech_stack_desc: Our team has an extensive stack and experience. We're not limited in languages and frameworks, allowing us to use the most optimal set of tools for each project.
dev.hight_quality_desc: Every day, we fight for quality in your project: selecting the most suitable tools, conducting multiple testing stages, and applying only best practices.
dev.transparency_desc: During the process, you can track tasks in real time and receive regular reports on work and timelines forecasts.
dev.expectations_desc: All our work is aimed at realizing your ideas precisely and on time. At the analysis stage, we thoroughly dissect and agree on your project vision, and at the development stage, we agree on results and deadlines.
dev.cases_desc: A sample of what we've built
dev.cases_nft_desc:
NFT projects in different networks
and on various marketplaces.
dev.cases_gamefi_desc:
Gaming projects based on
randomizers and referral systems.
dev.cases_starts_tokens_desc:
Token launches, presale organization,
and development of launchpads and dashboards.
dev.cases_web3_desc:
Development of analytical tools, as well as
blockchain-based business systems.

consulting.consulting_desc:
From tokenomics to go-to-market – expert guidance at every stage of your project lifecycle.
Trusted by founders building in DeFi, GameFi, and infrastructure.
consulting.advantages_of_consalting:
Advantages of Consulting
for Crypto Projects:
consulting.deep_analysis_desc: Our team of analysts, developers, and web3 business specialists actively interacts with industry leaders and stays in the context of all innovations. We create unique solutions that will help your project stand out and achieve success in a competitive market.
consulting.tech_skills_desc: Technical infrastructure determines half of a project's success. We provide valuable advice on team building, architecture, security, and progressive infrastructure development for your project.
consulting.strategic_planning_desc: We provide valuable advice on key elements of the chain that play an important role in creating a successful business roadmap. Let's build a strategy together that will take your project to a new level!

get_consult.get_consult_desc: Tell us about your project and we'll respond within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Cross-venue market making across CEX and DEX.

services.title: Full-Stack Liquidity Infrastructure
services.dex_desc: Native liquidity across 17 chains and 30+ DEXes — Raydium, Uniswap, StonFi, Aerodrome, Meteora, PancakeSwap, and more. Includes real-time on-chain analysis.
services.cex_desc: Institutional-grade order routing and liquidity management across 50+ centralized exchanges.
services.launch_desc: End-to-end launch support: architecture, listings, market bootstrapping, and first-week stability.
services.volume_desc: Continuous two-sided quoting maintains deep order books, tight spreads, and low slippage — so your token is tradable at any size.

how_it_works.title: Up and Running in 72 Hours
how_it_works.step1_desc: We audit your token, venues, and goals. You leave with a clear liquidity plan.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Our algorithms connect to your exchanges and on-chain pools — no downtime, no manual setup.
how_it_works.step3_desc: We go live and monitor 24/7. You get weekly reports and a direct line to our team.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.q1: What exactly does a market maker do?
faq.a1: A market maker continuously places buy and sell orders to keep your token liquid. This tightens the spread, reduces price impact for traders, and creates the appearance — and reality — of a healthy, active market.
faq.q2: Which exchanges and chains do you support?
faq.a2: We operate on 50+ CEX platforms including Binance, OKX, Bybit, and Gate, and across all major DEX ecosystems: Solana (Raydium, Jupiter), EVM (Uniswap, Curve), and TON.
faq.q3: How long does it take to get started?
faq.a3: Most integrations go live within 72 hours of the strategy call. For token launches, we recommend onboarding at least one week before the TGE.
faq.q4: Do you offer a trial period?
faq.a4: Yes — we offer a 2-week free pilot so you can see results before committing. No upfront payment required.
faq.a5: Bubblemaps shows how concentrated your token supply is. High concentration scares off investors and triggers sell pressure. We redistribute holder concentration algorithmically to make your token's health score clean.
faq.q6: How is volume management different from wash trading?
faq.a6: Our volume flow is organic-looking and calibrated to your token's natural activity. We build real depth and momentum — not fake numbers that get flagged by exchanges or analytics platforms.
faq.q7: What does the weekly report include?
faq.a7: Spread metrics, volume breakdown by venue, liquidity depth over time, and any notable market events. You'll always know exactly what's happening with your token.
